steps.t: Barad Nemorn is located near where the Morgulduin meets the Anduin in Southern Ithilien. You should take teeth from trolls you defeat in Barad Nemorn …
Barad Nemorn is located near where the Morgulduin meets the Anduin in Southern Ithilien. You should take teeth from trolls you defeat in Barad Nemorn …
Faramir's Look-out is located south-east of Osgiliath. You should bring the troll teeth to a Ranger at Faramir's Look-out.
